name: FUJITA CORPORATION Co.,Ltd.
summary: FUJITA CORPORATION Co.,Ltd. operates and manages fast food restaurants in Japan. It also provides lottery services, as well as operates various combined cafes, including Internet, DVD, game, billiards, etc.; and a 100 yen shop. The company operates its stores under the Mister Donut, Mos burger, Baby Face Planets, bull horn, Madoka, Oppe-chan, In warm weather, Hanamaru Udon, Doutor coffee shop, Yone no yu, Pepper lunch, Katon, Pork cutlet pork cutlet, Kitchen One, Dolce Ristorante, Space Create Own space, Celia good life goods, Lottery/toto, Ramen Happy Pussy, Charcoal grilled meat beef horn, Shabu-shabu, Yakitori and Kamo kamadoka, and Yonoya brands. As of April 1, 2018, it operated 69 stores. The company was formerly known as Family Foods Co., Ltd. and changed its name to FUJITA CORPORATION Co.,Ltd. in April 1996. FUJITA CORPORATION Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Tomakomai, Japan.
